transcript: Hello, my name is Gargag Aujachar and I am currently a 3rd year public science student specializing in artificial intelligence and machine learning at VIT Bhopal University. I have a strong interest in data analytics, machine learning and generative AI. I enjoy working on real-world problems where data can be used to generate meaningful insights and build intelligent systems. Recently I worked on a project called BitSense AI where I built a system that allows users to ask questions about YouTube videos using natural language. It uses techniques like semantic search, embeddings and retrieval augment generation that is rag to provide accurate and context-aware answers. I am also experienced and familiar with Python, machine learning frameworks and tools like Fast API, Langraph and LangQen and I have worked on building skill-level AI solutions. I am always eager to learn new technologies, improve my problem-solving skills and apply my knowledge to practical applications. Thank you very much.
